story.title: Our Story
story.content: For 17 years, we have welcomed families, groups of friends and teams to our house in the Ardennes. What started as a dream has grown into a passion: creating the perfect place for moments together.

philosophy.title: Festina Lente
philosophy.subtitle: Make haste slowly
philosophy.content: This Latin wisdom forms the core of our philosophy. At ArdenNest, everything revolves around slowing down, enjoying and truly being together.

owners.title: Christophe & Partner
owners.description: For 17 years, we have personally welcomed every group that stays with us. No anonymous key handover, but a warm welcome with tips about the area and the house.

cleaning.title: Housekeeping Team
cleaning.description: Ensures everything is spotless for your arrival

garden.title: Garden Maintenance
garden.description: Keeps the 2 hectares of garden in perfect condition

whyRelationship.title: Why the relationship matters
whyRelationship.content: On an OTA, you're a booking. With us, you're a guest. We know the house like no one else and are ready to make your stay as pleasant as possible.
